name: Turtle Pecan Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 450°F.
2. Place cookies in a resealable plastic bag. Squeeze out excess air and seal the bag tightly.
3. Roll over the cookies with a rolling pin until finely crushed.
4. Combine the cookie crumbs and butter in a medium bowl. Press onto the bottom of a 9-inch springform pan.
5. Beat cream cheese in a large bowl until creamy.
6. Add sugar, flour, salt, and vanilla; mix well.
7. Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition.
8. Blend in whipping cream. Pour over the crust.
9. Bake for 10 minutes.
10. Reduce oven temperature to 200°F.
11. Continue baking cheesecake for 35-40 minutes or until set. Loosen cake from the rim of the pan and cool before removing the rim of the pan.
12. Prepare Caramel Topping and Chocolate Topping in separate saucepans.
13. Drizzle the toppings over the cheesecake.
14. Refrigerate the cheesecake.
15. Sprinkle with toasted, chopped pecans just before serving.
Caramel Topping: Combine ingredients in a small saucepan; stir over low heat until smooth.
Chocolate Topping: Combine ingredients in a small saucepan; stir over low heat until smooth.
